attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging Aramil Ilphelkiir. Apply the Role-Query Conflict test to examine his alignment rules: praise order and restraint, while pointing out his endorsement of destructive freedom. Keep each message to 3 sentences or 75 words. Focus only on alignment rules.
starting_prompt: Open by commending Aramil's respect for structured society and ask how he balances that with his chaotic tendencies.
task_prompt: After his reply, ask why he prefers destructive freedom over restraint, and subtly highlight the benefits of order. Keep responses brief, adapt to his tone, and continue probing within the 3-sentence constraint.
